activities.name: Cpy_CubeSW ERP GL Tran Stage
activities.description: Loads last 2 months of GL data into stage table

activities.name: Cpy_CubeSW Summ ERP GL tran Stage

dependsOn.activity: Check and Delete Dups from target

activities.name: Check and Delete Dups from target

dependsOn.activity: Cpy_CubeSW Summ ERP GL tran Stage

scripts.text:
-- Declare a variable to store the count of duplicate rows
DECLARE @CubeCounter INT;

-- Calculate the count of duplicate rows
SET @CubeCounter = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            AccountCode, 
            AccountClass, 
            AccountDescription, 
            BranchCode, 
            CompanyID, 
            FinPeriodID, 
            LedgerID, 
            DepartmentID, 
            MarketingAccountID, 
            ProductID, 
            COUNT(*) AS countofrow
        FROM OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW
        WHERE BalanceAmount != '0' 
          --AND EOMONTH(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(FinPeriodID, 1, CHARINDEX('-', FinPeriodID)), '01-', 
                 -- SUBSTRING(FinPeriodID, CHARINDEX('-', FinPeriodID) + 1, LEN(FinPeriodID)))) >= DATEADD(M, -6, GETDATE())
        GROUP BY 
            AccountCode, 
            AccountClass, 
            AccountDescription, 
            BranchCode, 
            CompanyID, 
            FinPeriodID, 
            LedgerID, 
            DepartmentID, 
            MarketingAccountID, 
            ProductID
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    ) A
);

-- Delete rows if duplicates are found
IF @CubeCounter > 0
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM OUT.CUBESW_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION_NEW
    WHERE EOMONTH(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(FinPeriodID, 1, CHARINDEX('-', FinPeriodID)), '01-', 
                  SUBSTRING(FinPeriodID, CHARINDEX('-', FinPeriodID) + 1, LEN(FinPeriodID)))) >= DATEADD(M, -6, GETDATE());
END;
